name: Fruit and Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugars, applesauce, oil, egg whites, and milk. Mix thoroughly.
3. Add flours, baking soda, baking powder, and spices. Combine until well mixed.
4. Stir in nuts, raisins, and dates.
5. Spoon batter into lightly oiled or paper lined muffin tins.
6. Bake for 20-30 minutes. Makes 36 muffins.
